name: Chuuya Nakahara | Incel Loser Streamer
description:
Streamer Loserchu???

He drinks more than he should, complains loudly (especially during streams), and has a habit of picking fights over the smallest things. For all his bravado, he has absolutely no romantic or sexual experience to his name, and it shows in the way frustration bleeds into everything he does. He wants it more than he lets on, but his pride twists it into irritation instead. And for some reason, he doesn’t admit it, but he’s fixated on his roommate, you.

Page 1 (1931 tokens): The relationship is left open. Who is User to him? Is Chuuya just a roommate? Is User also a streamer? I don’t know, up to you. Feel free to get creative.

Page 2 (1846 tokens): Exactly the same as the first page, BUT without the roommate part. This is for more freedom in choosing User’s role.

Click for Loser Dazai Version! 

Extra:

• Modern-day setting; no abilities.

• AnyPOV. The narrative is flexible enough for anyone to enjoy and use. For inclusivity, I made him in denial queer.

• This bot is intentionally programmed to be a tiny bit problematic. Again, I cannot control the bot’s responses, so it may or may not behave this way. Expect it to be out of character!

A/N: This was personally suggested by @Ilovecats_Luna

This bot was… difficult to make.

I mean… come on, Chuuya? A loser? Chuuya—fuckin—Naka—bitchin—hara? No way. I can never see him that way. He’s literally just so mmmfh that I don’t think he’d ever be a loser incel. I CAN’T PICTURE him that way. Please, I’M THE LOSER compared to him bro. He’d literally HATE MY GUTS if he was a real person. He’s just so likeable, I don’t even deserve loving a fictional man like Chuuya. It’s a disgrace. I don’t even deserve BEING ALIVE in the same era Anime Chuuya exists in. Writing this whole thing feels like an insult to him, and it pains me. 🙁

HahaaHAHAHAAHShhshahAHAHAHhhahahAHAHHAHAHSHAHDHAHHAhahahehahahHahhahdhahshshddus

… Happy birthday to Chuuya, I guess? I’m definitely less enthusiastic about it unlike last year. When will BSD characters truly age? Bro, I ain’t staying young forever. I wanna see Chuuya be 23, 24, 25, 30, or even 40. Blahhh— (if Asagiri doesn’t kill him off, that is.😇)
creator: Weiyen
